subtitle: High-level Montana land context for outdoors planning (figures are approximate; verify with official agencies).

highlights.label: Montana gross area
highlights.note: Per U.S. Census Bureau state quick facts.

highlights.label: Federal lands (often multiple-use public recreation)
highlights.valueText: On the order of tens of millions of acres
highlights.note: BLM, USFS, NPS, FWS, BOR, DoD overlap — see CRS / federal inventories for methodology.

highlights.label: State trust lands (DNRC)
highlights.valueText: Roughly five million acres of trust land statewide
highlights.note: Use DNRC recreation rules and leased-block maps before relying on "public" assumptions.

dataSourcesWebsite.name: Montana GIS — parcels & public lands hub (Montana State Library MSDI)
dataSourcesWebsite.role: Statewide parcels, stewardship polygons, conservation easements, PLSS grids, downloads, and map services.

dataSourcesWebsite.name: Montana Cadastral GIS viewer (Department of Revenue lookup)
dataSourcesWebsite.role: Official parcel stewardship research map and lookups.

dataSourcesWebsite.name: FWP Hunt Planner
dataSourcesWebsite.role: Hunting districts, walk-in lands, Block Management overlays.

disclaimerShort: Montana State Library GIS parcels and stewardship layers are for informational purposes only — not for legal, engineering, or surveying purposes. Always confirm access, ownership, and regulations in the field.
